name: Ken's Tomato Egg Drop Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Finely chopped scallions (white part only)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the chicken stock into a pot and bring to a simmer.
2. If using fresh tomatoes, peel, seed and cut into 1-inch cubes.
3. If using canned tomatoes, chop them into small chunks.
4. Lightly beat the eggs in a separate bowl.
5. Add sesame oil to the egg mixture and stir well.
6. Combine light soy sauce and salt with the simmering stock. Stir to mix thoroughly.
7. Gently add the chopped tomatoes to the pot and simmer for 5 minutes.
8. Stir in the finely chopped scallions.
9. Slowly pour the egg mixture into the soup using a figure-eight motion, pulling the eggs through the pot to form strands.
10. Garnish with the reserved scallion tops.
Makes 4 to 6 servings
